    refine Continuous.congr (f := fun T ↦ ∑ i : Fin _, mapCLM (M i) (lineDerivCLM (b i) T)) ?_ ?_
    · exact continuous_finset_sum Finset.univ (fun i _ ↦
        (mapCLM (M i)).continuous.comp (lineDerivCLM (b i)).continuous)
    · intro T
      ext f v
      simp only [M, mapCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum, Finset.sum_apply, LinearMap.toContinuousLinearMap_apply]
      rw [← map_sum]
      congr
      simp only [Basis.sum_extend b v]

by
    let b := Basis.ofVectorSpace ℝ E
    let L (i : b.index) : F →L[ℝ] (E →L[ℝ] F) :=
      ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight (b.coord i) (ContinuousLinearMap.id ℝ F)
    have : (fun T f v ↦ lineDerivCLM v T f) =
        fun T ↦ ∑ i, mapCLM (L i) (lineDerivCLM (b i) T) := by
      ext T φ v
      simp only [L, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, mapCLM_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.id_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum', Finset.sum_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk, LinearMap.coe_toContinuousLinearMap',
        lineDerivCLM_apply, ← ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul, ← ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum,
        ← Finset.sum_smul, Basis.sum_coord_smul]
    rw [this]
    exact Continuous.sum fun i _ ↦ (mapCLM (L i)).continuous.comp (lineDerivCLM (b i)).continuous

end fderiv

by
    let b := Basis.ofVectorSpace ℝ E
    let L (i : Fin (Module.finrank ℝ E)) : F →L[ℝ] (E →L[ℝ] F) :=
      { toFun := fun y ↦ (b.coord i).smulRight y
        map_add' := fun y z ↦ by ext; simp
        map_smul' := fun c y ↦ by ext; simp
        cont := by
          refine continuous_of_continuousAt_zero _ (fun U hU ↦ ?_)
          rw [ContinuousLinearMap.strongTopology_zero_nbhd_iff_uniformOnBounded] at hU ⊢
          intro B hB; specialize hU _ (hB.image (b.coord i))
          rcases hU with ⟨V, hV, hUV⟩
          exact ⟨V, hV, fun f hf x hx ↦ hUV (Set.mem_image_of_mem _ hx) hf⟩ }
    refine continuous_of_eq (fun T ↦ ∑ i, mapCLM (L i) (lineDerivCLM (b i) T)) ?_ ?_
    · exact continuous_finset_sum _ (fun i _ ↦ (mapCLM (L i)).continuous.comp (lineDerivCLM (b i)).continuous)
    · ext T f v
      simp only [mapCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum, Finset.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk',
        LinearMap.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply, L, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk,
        lineDerivCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.map_neg]
      rw [← Finset.sum_smul, ← ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul, ← map_sum, Basis.sum_coord_smul]

by
    let b := FiniteDimensional.finBasis ℝ E
    suffices Continuous fun T => ∑ i, mapCLM (ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight (b.dualBasis i) (ContinuousLinearMap.id ℝ F)) (lineDerivCLM (b i) T) by
      convert this; ext T f v
      simp only [mapCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.id_apply, lineDerivCLM_apply, ← map_smul, ← map_sum, ← smul_neg]
      congr
      simp only [TestFunction.lineDerivCLM, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk',
        LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, LinearMap.map_sum, LinearMap.map_smul]
      simp [Basis.sum_dual_apply_smul_coord]
    exact continuous_finset_sum _ fun i _ ↦ (mapCLM _).continuous.comp (lineDerivCLM _).continuous

end fderiv

by
    let b := FiniteDimensional.finBasis ℝ E
    let S : 𝓓'(Ω, F) →L[ℝ] 𝓓'(Ω, E →L[ℝ] F) := ∑ i,
      (mapCLM ((b.coord i).toContinuousLinearMap.smulRight (1 : F →L[ℝ] F))).comp (lineDerivCLM (b i))
    refine S.continuous.congr (fun T ↦ ?_)
    ext f
    refine b.ext (fun i ↦ ?_)
    simp only [S, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
      mapCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.one_apply,
      lineDerivCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum, Finset.sum_apply,
      LinearMap.coe_toContinuousLinearMap', ContinuousLinearMap.coe_coe]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_single i]
    · simp only [Basis.coord_apply, Basis.repr_self, smul_eq_mul, mul_one]
    · intro j _ hji
      simp only [Basis.coord_apply, Basis.repr_self_of_ne _ _ hji, smul_eq_mul, mul_zero,
        zero_smul]
    · intro hi
      exact (hi (Finset.mem_univ i)).elim

end fderiv

by
    let b := FiniteDimensional.finBasis ℝ E
    let L := ∑ i, (mapCLM (b.coord i).smulRight).comp (lineDerivCLM (b i))
    refine L.continuous.congr fun T ↦ ?_
    ext φ v

      mapCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum, Finset.sum_apply, lineDerivCLM_apply]
    rw [← b.sum_coords v]
    simp [map_sum, map_smul, map_neg]

    apply continuous_pi
    intro v
    exact (lineDerivCLM v).cont

by
    let b := FiniteDimensional.finBasis ℝ E
    let ι (i : Fin (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) : F →L[ℝ] (E →L[ℝ] F) :=
      LinearMap.mkContinuous
        { toFun := fun y ↦ (b.coord i).smulRight y
          map_add' := fun _ _ ↦ by ext; simp
          map_smul' := fun _ _ ↦ by ext; simp }
        ‖b.coord i‖
        (fun y ↦ by
          rw [ContinuousLinearMap.norm_smulRight_apply]
          exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right le_rfl (norm_nonneg _))
    let Ψ : 𝓓'(Ω, F) →L[ℝ] 𝓓'(Ω, E →L[ℝ] F) :=
      ∑ i, (ι i).postcomp_uniformConvergenceCLM.comp (lineDerivCLM (b i))
    apply Ψ.continuous.congr
    intro T; ext φ v
    simp only [Ψ, ι, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.postcomp_uniformConvergenceCLM_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum, Finset.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk',
      LinearMap.mkContinuous_apply, LinearMap.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply]
    rw [← map_sum, ← smul_sum]
    congr 1
    rw [lineDerivCLM_apply, lineDerivCLM_apply, map_neg, map_neg, neg_inj]
    rw [← Basis.sum_repr b v]
    simp only [map_sum, map_smul]
